channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇵🇸 Palestinians vote in local elections across West Bank and Gaza
item.description: Local elections held in the occupied West Bank and one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not participating in what marks a rare electoral moment.

item.title: 🇪🇸 Europe pushes back at reported US threat to suspend Spain from NATO
item.description: NATO officials say there is no provision to expel members after an internal Pentagon email reportedly outlined options to punish allies over perceived lack of support for the Iran war.

item.title: 🏔️ Everest flood warning system abandoned, thousands at risk
item.description: A multi-million dollar flood warning system at Imja glacial lake near Everest has not been maintained since 2016, leaving local communities vulnerable to outburst floods.

item.title: 🚗 Chinese EV giant BYD says it can thrive without US market
item.description: Chinas largest electric vehicle manufacturer positions itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels as fuel prices rise and geopolitical tensions shape trade.

item.title: 🚢 Pirates hijack oil tanker off Somalia coast
item.description: Piracy in the Indian Ocean has made a comeback in recent years, with a vessel seized in a region once notorious for maritime attacks.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Rules Out Direct US Talks as Envoys Head to Pakistan
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad but Iranian officials say there will be no direct negotiations with Washington, despite US envoys Witkoff and Kushner also traveling to Pakistan for potential indirect talks.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Deploying Warships to Mediterranean for Possible Hormuz Mission
item.description: German navy vessels are being sent to the Mediterranean as Berlin considers a potential role in protecting shipping through the Strait of Hormuz amid Iran attacks on commercial vessels.

item.title: ⚓ Three US Aircraft Carriers Now Operating in Middle East
item.description: For the first time since 2003, three US carrier strike groups are operating in Central Command's area of responsibility as the US military buildup around Iran continues.

item.title: 🤖 Ukraine to Field 25,000 Ground Robots for Frontline Logistics
item.description: Ukraines military plans to deploy 25,000 unmanned ground vehicles to replace soldiers in dangerous logistics missions. Ground robots ran more than 9,000 frontline missions in March, triple Novembers count.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky Signs Cooperation Deals During First Wartime Visit to Azerbaijan
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky arrived in Azerbaijan for talks with Azerbaijani President Ilham Aliyev, signing cooperation agreements in his first wartime visit to the Caucasus nation.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Seven Dead as Russian Strike Hits Residential Building in Dnipro
item.description: A major Russian attack on Ukraine killed at least seven people, with the city of Dnipro hardest hit after a strike on a residential building. Four deaths were reported from the Dnipro attack alone.

item.title: ⚔️ Coordinated jihadist attacks across Mali kill dozens
item.description: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north of the country in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years, with armed groups launching coordinated assaults across multiple locations.

item.title: 🏛️ NATO has no provision to expel members after reported US threat to Spain
item.description: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war, raising concerns about alliance unity.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK affirms Falklands sovereignty after reported US review threat
item.description: Number 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with the UK after an internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.

item.title: 🚢 Thousands of seafarers stranded by ongoing US blockade on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US military blockade of the strategic waterway has trapped cargo ships and their crews, creating a humanitarian crisis for merchant mariners unable to return home.

item.title: ✈️ European airlines face surging jet fuel costs from Hormuz disruption
item.description: Airlines across Europe are grappling with rising fuel costs as the Strait of Hormuz blockade disrupts global oil supplies and pushes prices higher.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany unveils first-ever military strategy for Bundeswehr
item.description: The new strategy document outlines Germanys defense priorities and force structure as the country modernizes its military amid heightened European security concerns.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran wields Strait of Hormuz as leverage in standoff
item.description: Analysis of how Tehran is using control of the strategic waterway to apply pressure on international actors amid the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🏛️ EU anti-fraud office opens formal investigation into Mandelson
item.description: The EUs anti-fraud office confirms it has sufficient information to launch an investigation, though it does not specify if it involves fraud.

item.title: ⚔️ Key suspect in notorious Tadamon massacre during Syria civil war arrested
item.description: Amjad Youssef was wanted over the mass killing of blindfolded civilians in April 2013 in the district of Damascus, in one of the Syrian wars most notorious atrocities.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel waiting for green light to renew war against Iran, says Katz
item.description: Israeli officials suggest they are prepared to resume military operations against Tehran if diplomatic efforts do not yield results, according to local media reports.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Battle-tested Ukrainians begin training German troops
item.description: Ukrainian soldiers with frontline experience are now instructing German military personnel, marking a reversal in training dynamics as European nations learn from Ukrainian battlefield expertise.

item.title: 💰 US Treasury sanctions Chinese entities for Iranian oil purchases
item.description: New sanctions target Chinas procurement of Iranian petroleum as Washington escalates economic pressure on Tehran and its trading partners.

item.title: 🇺🇳 Three Kosovo Serbs jailed over deadly gun battle and monastery siege
item.description: Kosovos court sentenced two men to life imprisonment and another to a 30-year term for the 2023 attack on Orthodox monastery and subsequent shootout.

item.title: 🇮🇷 No direct Iran-US talks expected in Islamabad, Iranian officials say
item.description: Despite US and Iranian envoys both heading to Pakistan, Iranian officials clarified there will be no direct negotiations between Tehran and Washington in the current diplomatic push.
